overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l}\langle q _ {f}, T | q _ {i}, 0 \rangle \approx \int \frac {d p _ {N - 1}}{2 \pi \hbar} d q _ {N - 1} \dots \frac {d p _ {1}}{2 \pi \hbar} d q _ {1} \frac {d p _ {0}}{2 \pi \hbar}\\\qquad \times \exp \left\{- \frac {i}{\hbar} \sum_ {m = 0} ^ {N - 1} \left[ H (p _ {m}, q _ {m}) \epsilon - p _ {m} (q _ {m + 1} - q _ {m}) \right] \right\}\\\rightarrow \int [ d p d q ] \exp \left\{\frac {i}{\hbar} \int_ {0} ^ {T} d t [ p \dot {q} - H (p, q) ] \right\}.\end{array}\tag {A.1}\tag{A.1.12}
